_doc: All SAS Flex emergency-line issues, one file. Each row tagged with `deal`.
_usage: Deploy this one file. The adapter loads it once and filters rows by the active deal id (row.deal === dealId).
_contract: Each row is the emergency_calls issue shape + a leading `deal` tag.

calls.summary: The caller is calling for the 2nd time [follow-up]
She is locked out and the ER lockout number is not working.
She's locked out of the bedroom
In greenery and smoke detector is beepin[g]
Ceiling is leaking water in the Master Bed[room]
Found a bedbug on her sheet, needs fumigation; washer leaking all over; emailed yesterday too.
We had a mouse, they put some traps but I w[ant follow-up]
Refrigerator leaking a significant amount of water; cooling system; wants it inspected.
